svg.aria-label: Code dependencies versus prose relations, with the measured blind spot
svg.text: One graph, two kinds of knowledge
.graphgraph\graph.gg · 87 module pairs linked by code · 105 linked only by prose — a dependency grapher draws the solid lines and stops there

svg.text: 242 member calls resolved to an edge · 1,021 call sites had no receiver evidence and produce no edge at all, so a missing line is not proof of a missing call
